title: tetrameles grahamiana
intro: Tetrameles grahamiana, also known as the Australian balsam or woolly balsam, is a plant species native to Australia and New Guinea, belonging to the family Tetramelaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tetrameles grahamiana include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to the affected areas.
